title: stardom
description: a stellar overhaul to minecraft's textures
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KlKsIY4Av_s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### about stardom
this pack provides a serene, easy on the eyes, experience to your everyday minecraft gameplay!

### optional dependencies
this pack uses a custom sky, which is only visible with mods that allow for optifine skyboxes such as [skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify), etc

### pack updates
i aim to update the pack with every major minecraft release. if you have any suggestions, message me on [twitter](https://x.com/umrszzz)

### terms of use
this pack is intended for personal use only (private edits allowed), any public redistributions/ edits of this pack is not allowed
